abilities.description: When you hold a weapon and sing a keening for those it has killed, roll +heart. On a strong hit, the weapon is imbued with supernatural energy; when the wielder makes a move to inflict harm and score a hit, mark progress. If they roll a 1 on their action die, the effect is lost. On a weak hit, as above, but the voices of those who were slain join in your song; make a suffer move [-2].

Once per fight, the wielder may take an automatic strong hit when they @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash}. If they do, the energy is harrowing; they @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} [-1].

Once per imbuing, the wielder may drain the weapon's energy to take an automatic strong hit when making the @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} move. if they do, take +1 momentum.
